---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
load("data/olive.rda")
```

```{r}
data <- olive %>% mutate(Area = NULL, Region = factor(Region))
```

```{r}
library(tidymodels)
```

```{r}
split <- initial_split(data, prop = 0.75, strata = Region)
```

```{r}
train <- training(split)
test <-  testing(split)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
```

```{r}
rec <- recipe(Region ~., data = train) %>% 
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())
```

```{r}
model <- decision_tree() %>% set_engine("rpart") %>% set_mode("classification")
```

```{r}
wf <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(rec) %>% add_model(model)
```

```{r}
fit_wf = fit(wf, data = train)
```

```{r}
pred = predict(fit_wf, new_data = test) %>% bind_cols(test %>% select(Region))
```

```{r}
accuracy(pred, truth = Region, estimate = .pred_class)
```

```{r}
conf_mat(pred, truth = Region, estimate = .pred_class) 
```
